---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for improving this project
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Describe the feature**
A clear and concise description of the feature you would like to see.

**Motivation**
Why is this feature important? What value does it add?

**Proposed solution**
Describe how you would like this feature to work. Include examples if helpful.

**Alternatives considered**
Describe any alternative solutions or approaches you considered.

**Additional context**
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
